title: Tree Falling
description: this fabric 1.21.1 mod adds physics based tree chopping.
body:
This Mod is still in alpha so expect bugs please report them

This is a simple fabric 1.21.1 mod that adds physics based tree harvesting.

**_if it crashes on startup, try using java 24._**

~~_**```i am not responsible for any destoryed bases from this mod```**_~~
